titleStmt.title: SII 39.122: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 122. (A.R. No. 122 of 1916.) ETTIYĀTTALI, ARANTANGI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. AGASTYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL •••••••••• ŚAKA 1363 (1441 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription records the gift of land by Uyyāṇḍār Pāṇḍipperumal of Māṅguḍi vēlar in Vaḍaveḷḷār alias Sundarapāṇḍya vaḷanāḍu to the deity Aḻagiya-Maṇavāḻapperumāḷ of Arantāṅgi, probably for performing pūja in the temple. Among the three signatories in the record only the name of Kāliṅgarāyar is clearly mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
satyam
cakātta tam 1000 3 100 6 10 3 mel cellā niṉṟa tunmati varuṣam puraṭṭāti ø 2 10 1 Aṟantāṅki Aracu Uṭaiyār
Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ toṇṭaimāṉār yilakkaṟaikku nam vaṭaveḷḷāṟāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya vaḷaṉāṭṭu māṅku
ṭi veḷḷār Uyyāṇṭār pāṇṭipperumāḷ pakkal koṇṭu kalveṭṭik kuṭutta poṉṉaṉ vayakkal rūpāy Orumā nālumā � muttāṇ
ṭār paṇṇai rūpāy 1kāṇi cuḷḷi nālumā marutañcey rūpāy Orumā � nampaṉ vayakkal rūpāy Orumā Āka Eṟṟac curukkam Uṭpaṭa rūpāy 5mā Iṉṉilam Añcu
māvukkum yiṟaiyiliyāka kaḻittu kuṭuttu yiṉṉilattukku veṭṭimuṭṭi viṉiyokam mākkalam Eṟpeṟpaṭṭa camutta
prāttikaḷukkum ṉāyaṉār tiruvakatticuramuṭaiyāṟku māttāl Añcu marakkāl nellukkuṭukka kaṟpittu kuṭutta A
ḷavukku yiṉṉilam Añcumāvum Īñcūraṇiyum Ilakkappa cantirātittavarai kāṇi Āṭciyākap paṟṟi Āḷa
kkaṭavārākavum kitam paṇṇinavaṉ gaṅkaikaraiyil brāhmaṇaraiyum kapilaiyaiyum koṉṟa pāvam
peṟak kaṭavārākavum Ippaṭi Uṭaiyavar Aruḷicceypaṭikku tiruccuṟṟaṉ kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 39.122 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
